_meta.purpose: Urinalysis dipstick + physical/chemical interpretation for the rules engine + LLM. Complements the urine_sediment vision detector (which reads the microscopy). Decision support only.
_meta.source: Standard urinalysis references (Strasinger). Curated for JORINOVA NEXUS.

colour.name: Colour
colour.note: Red -> blood/myoglobin/beetroot; brown -> bilirubin/myoglobin; dark -> concentrated.

specific_gravity.name: Specific gravity
specific_gravity.note: Low -> diabetes insipidus/overhydration; fixed ~1.010 -> renal failure.

ph.name: pH
ph.note: Alkaline -> urease UTI (Proteus), RTA, veg diet; acidic -> ketoacidosis.

protein.name: Protein
protein.note: Persistent -> glomerular disease; quantify with ACR/PCR. Dipstick misses light chains.

glucose.name: Glucose
glucose.note: Positive -> hyperglycaemia exceeding renal threshold, or SGLT2i, or renal glycosuria.

ketones.name: Ketones
ketones.note: Positive -> DKA, starvation, alcohol. Combine with glucose + gas.

blood.name: Blood (haem)
blood.note: Positive -> RBCs (haematuria), free Hb, or myoglobin. Confirm with microscopy (see urine_sediment).

nitrite.name: Nitrite
nitrite.note: Positive -> Enterobacterales UTI (specific, not sensitive). LE + nitrite positive -> UTI likely.
